text.title: Agency Rebrand Methodology Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of `Agency Rebrand Methodology` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Existing retainer clients MUST receive 1:1 outreach (founder phone or video call, not group email) ≥ 14 days before public launch. Public-first rebrand is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Clients who learn about rebrand via Twitter feel demoted; 1:1 comms preserves the relationship and converts most to the new pricing.

rule.statement: Every URL on the old domain MUST have a 301 redirect to a mapped URL on the new domain, deployed before public launch and validated with a crawl. Catch-all redirects to homepage are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Catch-all redirects drop ranking 40-70%; per-URL 301 map retains 80-95% of organic traffic through the rebrand.

rule.statement: Every active retainer contract MUST have a signed addendum acknowledging the new entity name, payment-account change, and (if applicable) new pricing — before invoices are issued on the new brand.
rule.rationale: Unsigned addenda cause receivables to bounce between old/new accounts; signed addenda are operational hygiene.

rule.statement: Price increases MUST give existing clients ≥ 90 days at the old rate (or an opt-in early-renewal at old rate). Day-1 price jumps are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Day-1 jumps cause churn waves; 90-day runway converts most clients and isolates true churners.

rule.statement: Portfolio cases MUST be re-titled / re-framed under the new niche before the new site goes live. Cross-niche portfolio under the new brand is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Mixed-niche portfolio under a niche brand reads as confused; pre-launch re-anchor preserves the niche claim.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
